title: Support Witnessing Sigstore Signing with a Timestamp Authority Server
body:
Github Artifact Attestation https://github.blog/changelog/2024-06-25-artifact-attestations-is-generally-available/ only uses public good rekor and fulcio for public repositories.
For private repositories it supports usage of the following github hosted instances (note it does not use rekor):

https://fulcio.githubapp.com/
https://timestamp.githubapp.com/

It would be great if [containers-sigstore-signing-params.yaml.5](https://github.com/containers/image/blob/main/docs/containers-sigstore-signing-params.yaml.5.md) supported a timestamp authority server in the config:

```yaml
fulcio:
  fulcioURL: "https://fulcio.githubapp.com"
  oidcMode: "staticToken"
  oidcIDToken: "placeholder"
timestampAuthorityURL: "https://timestamp.githubapp.com"
```

Refer to 
- https://github.com/actions/toolkit/blob/main/packages/attest/src/sign.ts#L72
- https://github.com/actions/toolkit/blob/main/packages/attest/src/endpoints.ts#L44

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

More to the point, I think we should also want to _accept_ signatures using a timestamp authority, not Rekor.
